response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced generalist engineer (~19 years) with a current Staff title, strong TypeScript/Node and AWS background, and directly relevant recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at Naver. However, his hands-on GenAI experience spans roughly one year, far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions, and the resume shows no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or Python — all core to this role. His teaching, workshops, and open-source leadership suggest the communication skills a forward-deployed role needs, but the AI depth gap is substantial.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience at Naver, matching key technologies in the role
19 years of production engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems, with TypeScript and AWS (CDK) depth
Proven communicator and mentor via conference talks, multi-day courses, and sustained open-source project leadership
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-related work versus the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or data-pipeline-for-ML experience
Python absent from skills and work history, and no customer-facing consulting or technical-discovery track record
